name: carbon-footprint-website
description: Everyday choices—like how we travel, eat, and use energy—contribute to climate change, yet most people lack tools to understand their personal impact. This project introduces a simple, quiz-based Carbon Footprint Calculator that helps users track emissions, get personalized tips, and build sustainable habits through a gamified experience.

scripts.test: npm --prefix backend run test:ci && npm --prefix frontend run test:ci
scripts.test:coverage: npm --prefix backend run test:coverage && npm --prefix frontend run test:coverage
scripts.test:ci: npm --prefix backend run test:ci && npm --prefix frontend run test:ci
